recent_calls.summary: Debra called to report that her AC unit won't shut off or turn on properly. She requested the first available service appointment on Tuesday and provided her service address and email for updates. The agent confirmed the details, collected feedback, and assured her that the team will contact her soon.

Ellen called to report smelling gas at her home and requested someone to come out first thing in the morning. She also asked to speak with the field manager and requested a callback in the morning so she can be present. The agent documented her request and assured her that a representative will contact her the next business day.

The user called to schedule a spring tune-up appointment for their air conditioning with American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the service type and that it was a routine maintenance visit, then asked for the preferred day and time to schedule the appointment. The agent planned to have the team follow up to confirm the appointment.

The user called Budget's after-hours assistant to inquire if the company sells parts. The agent informed the user that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing does not sell parts directly. The call ended shortly after this exchange.
The call was very brief and disconnected shortly after the agent introduced herself and asked for the ZIP code. No further interaction or information exchange occurred.

Milton Guzman, representing a property management company, called to report a tenant's hot water tank not lighting and requested a regular service appointment. The agent collected the service address, contact details, and scheduling preferences, and confirmed that the team will reach out the next business day to arrange the appointment. Milton rated the experience positively, highlighting the quickness and effectiveness of the service.

The user, Song Yoon, reported that their upstairs AC unit is not working and requested a technician to check it at their home in Chesterfield. The agent confirmed the service details, scheduled the earliest available appointment for the next day, and the user declined information about maintenance programs. The call ended positively with the user providing a high satisfaction rating.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Ella Pitts called to schedule a routine maintenance appointment for her AC unit on a flexible Wednesday. The agent collected her contact details, service address, and email, and confirmed the appointment preference. Ella provided positive feedback, rating the assistant as very helpful and easy to understand.

Dwayne Wells called to schedule a regular service appointment for his cooling system. The agent confirmed his details and noted that the team will follow up next business day to confirm the appointment. Dwayne also provided positive feedback, rating the AI assistant experience as five out of five.

The user called after hours and requested to speak with a live representative. The agent informed the user that a live representative was not available but offered to take down information. The call ended shortly after without further details.

The user, Diana, called to report that a scheduled service call for her air conditioning did not occur. She explained the issue with her AC compressor and requested an ASAP service appointment. The agent confirmed her details, noted special instructions about pets, and the user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to cancel a previously scheduled HVAC service appointment because their air conditioning is now working fine. The agent confirmed the cancellation and assured the user that the team would be notified. The user expressed gratitude and ended the call.

The user, Ruth Robinson, called to schedule an appointment for a new central air unit installation as her current unit is not working. She provided her contact details, service address, and preferred appointment times, and inquired about financing options. The agent confirmed the details and assured a follow-up to discuss availability and financing.
The user called and requested to speak with a live representative rather than the assistant. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent successfully.

Johanna called to schedule routine cleaning and maintenance for her air conditioner. After discussing preferred times, she booked an appointment for Friday, April 17, 2026, at 2 PM. The agent confirmed the booking and informed her about the dispatch fee, and Johanna declined to provide feedback.

The user reported an issue with their hot water not working and requested to speak with a live representative. The agent attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to obtain the QMID code or relevant documentation for a water heater purchased in December 2023 for tax purposes. The agent explained the process, offered to have the team look up the installation details, and marked the request as urgent for a callback. The user confirmed no additional information was needed and ended the call positively.
The user called to follow up on parts that were ordered. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to confirm if their repair appointment was still scheduled for today. The agent found the appointment with technician Patrick scheduled between 11 AM and 1 PM, but the user reported the technician did not arrive at that time. The agent then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Mitra Boodram, called to reschedule a furnace installation to an earlier date than next Friday under a home warranty. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly to assist with the rescheduling. The call ended after the user was connected to another representative.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond the initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user did not respond meaningfully, and the call ended shortly after.

Andrea called to discuss the cost modifications on a plumbing estimate and requested to speak with a technician as soon as possible. The agent confirmed the details and informed Andrea that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her soon. Andrea declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback on the call experience.

The user, Desiree, was contacted by Sophie from Budget regarding a service request related to her apartment's air conditioning, which was not working. Desiree was unsure about the dispatch number and corrected the agent about the service details. The call ended with the agent transferring Desiree to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with Nicole, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate person. The call ended with a successful transfer without further interaction.
The user called Budget and inquired if the call was from a real person or a computer. The agent explained it was an assistant and then transferred the user to a live representative as requested.

Tony called to schedule a routine maintenance service appointment through American Home Shield for Thursday morning. The agent confirmed the details and informed Tony that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. Tony declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to speak to someone, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Nathan from American Home Shield called to request an earlier dispatch date for Loretta Hobbs' air conditioning service, currently scheduled for Friday the seventeenth. The agent confirmed details and assured that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. Nathan provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to follow up on an estimate for air conditioning insulation work. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user called but quickly realized they had the wrong number and apologized before ending the call.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.

The user called to schedule a cooling service appointment under an American Home Shield dispatch for an air conditioner that won't turn on. The agent collected all necessary details including the dispatch number, service address, preferred appointment time, and contact information, and confirmed the information with the user. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended with the agent confirming that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing will reach out soon.

The user, Adrienne, called to schedule a service call and requested to speak with a live agent. The virtual assistant confirmed the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to reschedule a service appointment to the afternoon due to an emergency doctor's appointment for her husband. The agent confirmed the service was an emergency related to a gas furnace under a home warranty and transferred the call to a live agent for immediate assistance.
The user called looking to speak to Daniel. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and asked to speak with a live representative. The agent confirmed and successfully transferred the call to a live agent. The call lasted 29 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to schedule an appointment for a standard service request related to billing. The agent identified the user's role as the owner and transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a live agent named Amy, and the agent transferred the call successfully to another representative. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to clarify details about a service priced at $168 related to summer AC maintenance and winter heating service. The user mentioned no current issues with the AC and that a technician had come out to clean it. The agent attempted to schedule AC cleaning or maintenance but the call ended abruptly.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately after the greeting.

The user called Budget and requested to speak with either CG or Amy at the office. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The call ended with a successful transfer.

Walter Moore called to confirm if he had an appointment for today. The agent verified his identity and confirmed an appointment scheduled with technician Michael between 3:15 and 4:15 PM. Walter declined any further assistance and ended the call.
The user called and requested to speak with a live agent. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent successfully.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent to assist further.

The user called to inquire about an appointment related to home warranty work for their cooling system. The agent gathered basic information and then transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.
